title: carex divulsa subsp. leersii
intro: Carex divulsa subsp. leersii, also known as the alpine wood sedge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the European Alps and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex divulsa subsp. leersii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Carex divulsa subsp. leersii are typically made by infusing the dried plant in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
